pr.title: Record: Scylla + GPTQ + BH3072 — val_bpb 1.0856 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines Scylla 998-token TokenMonster tokenization with AR self-gen GPTQ int6 and a VRL/BigramHash 3072x112-rich 11-layer architecture to keep the artifact compact.
techniques: AR self-generated GPTQ int6 with Cholesky Hessian compensation
11-layer VRL/XSA design with BigramHash 3072x112 and QK-Gain 4.0
Scylla TokenMonster tokenizer reducing tokens per byte
